name: 06-policy-signing
hypothesis: Realm setup for the 06-policy-signing Playwright test: a realm role 'TestRole' exists, both threshold approvers (the test-app admin and admin2) hold it, and a public test-app client is registered, so a threshold-2 TestInit:1 signing request can gather two role-holding approvals; the baseline token still ORK-signs.

args.name: TestRole
args.description: Role required to approve the threshold-2 signing request (06-policy-signing)

_provides: realm role 'TestRole'; the test-app admin and admin2 both hold it (the two threshold approvers); a public 'testapp' client (origin http://localhost:3000).
